name: Potato Cakes (Aloo Roti)
recipeInstructions:
1. These hors d'oeuvres are easy to make and can be shallow or deep fried. Find chick pea flour (besan) at an Indian grocery store.
2. Make sure vegetable oil is heated to 350°F before adding food. Test with a deep fry thermometer. Too cool oil makes everything limp and greasy. Drain on a rack or paper towel before serving.
3. Cut onion in half and slice about 1/4 inch thick.
4. Beat together egg, flour and enough water to make a batter as thick as whipping cream. Add spices.
5. Let rest for 15 minutes.
6. Stir onions into the mixture and let sit for 5 minutes.
7. Heat about 1 inch of oil in a skillet on high heat. When very hot, drop a small mound of onion rings into the oil and gently press down with a spatula.
